category: metal wall art panels and decorative metal signs
style: laser-cut metal silhouette, powder-coated finish, sharp negative-space cutouts, layered shadow on the wall, modern minimalist or rustic farmhouse, suitable for laser/CNC fabrication
targetAudience: homeowners decorating living rooms/bedrooms/entryways, housewarming and wedding gift buyers, farmhouse and modern decor fans, outdoor patio/garden decorators
designPromptExtra: Design must be a single-color flat silhouette suitable for laser or CNC cutting from sheet metal. Solid black on pure white background, no gradients, no shading, no text effects, no photographic detail. All shapes must be connected (no floating islands). Negative space cutouts allowed. Print-ready vector-style line work, 1:1 square unless reference dictates otherwise.
descriptionVoice: warm, design-forward, emphasizes craftsmanship, finish options, mounting ease, indoor/outdoor durability, gift-worthiness; never references apparel, fabric, printing, or wash care
